title: Crispy Egyptian Wheat Flatbread
description: A yeasty and springy flatbread with a crisp finish, perfect for midnight cravings and low-glycemic diets.
instructions: In a bowl combine whole wheat flour, salt, baking soda, and caraway seeds.
Dissolve active dry yeast in 1 cup warm water and let sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
Add the yeast mixture, honey, and olive oil to the dry ingredients and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Transfer dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise at room temperature for 1 hour until doubled.
Punch down the dough, divide into 8 equal portions, and roll each into a thin disc.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and lightly brush with olive oil.
Cook each flatbread for 2 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy, flipping once.
Serve warm with a side of hummus or fresh salad.
